name: roblox-asset-search-mcp
description: SQL-backed (node:sqlite DAL/DAO) shared asset brain MCP for asset-driven Roblox game design: ranked Creator Store discovery with explicit failure signaling, cross-process-safe claims/reviews/inspections/palettes, publish-permission gates, headless assembly planning, and Studio visual-gate validation. All tools prefixed roblox_. Decoupled from the Roblox Studio MCP.

scripts.test: npm run test:proof-bundle && npm run test:offline && npm run test:gate && npm run test:playable-space && npm run test:world-asset-family && npm run test:studio-adapter && npm run test:studio-world-family-adapter && npm run test:studio-core && npm run test:fragment-fixtures && npm run test:coordinator-adapter && npm run test:asset-delivery && npm run test:asset-acquisition && npm run test:project-template && npm run test:asset-brain && npm run test:fixture && npm run test:prompt-contracts && npm run test:game-kit && npm run test:smoke && npm run test:dal && npm run test:toolbox-failures && npm run test:tool-registration
